channel.title: Statistics and history on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel
channel.description: Recent content in Statistics and history on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.6.8
item.description: What’s Changed Add field wrapp to LongTextField to allign with other fields by @tplevko in https://github.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.6.7
item.description: What’s Changed chore(deps): update dependency typescript to v5.4.2 by @renovate in https://github.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.6.6
item.description: What’s Changed fix: Making field prop optional by @shivamG640 in https://github.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.6.5
item.description: What’s Changed fix: Default values are not shown in the Form by @shivamG640 in https://github.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.6.4
item.description: What’s Changed fix: Mark deprecated configuration options by @shivamG640 in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-next Release 2.0.0-TP2

item.title: kaoto-next Release 2.0.0-TP2-RC2
item.description: What’s Changed fix(dependencies): Move lodash.cloneDeep from devDependencies to dependencies array by @lordrip in https://github.

item.description: What’s Changed fix: Adding space between fields by @shivamG640 in https://github.

item.description: What’s Changed fix(695): Missing spacing between nested form fields by @shivamG640 in https://github.

item.description: What’s Changed Features feat(CanvasForm): Make title sticky by @lordrip in https://github.

item.description: Andrea Cosentino made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-next v2.0.0-TP1
item.description: Introducing Kaoto 2.0.0 TP1 (Tech Preview) - A New Chapter for the Kaoto Project We are thrilled to announce the release of Kaoto 2.

item.title: kaoto-next v2.0.0-TP1-RC2
item.description: What’s Changed Features feat(canvas): Validate nodes upon rendering by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-next v2.0.0-TP1-RC1
item.description: What’s Changed feat: Hide navigation items by @d4n1b in https://github.com/KaotoIO/kaoto-next/pull/671 release: restore 2.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.6.0
item.description: What’s Changed Feat/add field hint popover by @d4n1b in https://github.com/KaotoIO/uniforms-patternfly/pull/62 New Contributors @d4n1b made their first contribution in https://github.

item.description: What’s Changed chore(select): Export SelectField types by @lordrip in https://github.com/KaotoIO/uniforms-patternfly/pull/61 chore(deps): update dependency @types/react to v18.

item.description: What’s Changed chore(deps): update dependency @types/node to v20.11.0 by @renovate in https://github.

item.description: What’s Changed chore(deps): update dependency ts-node to v10.9.2 by @renovate in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-next v0.6.0
item.description: What’s Changed fix: Expression: Can’t use unquoted number for constant expression by @igarashitm in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-next v0.4.0
item.description: What’s Changed fix(313) - Kamelets in Camel Routes are not handled properly by @shivamG640 in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-next v0.3.0
item.description: What’s Changed chore(viz): Add CustomNode component by @lordrip in https://github.com/KaotoIO/kaoto-next/pull/202 chore(viznode): Remove usage of the VisualizationNode class by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-next v0.5.0
item.description: What’s Changed Use Java 21 instead of Java 17 by @apupier in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.4.0
item.description: What’s Changed Update package.json to 1.4.0-dev by @lordrip in https://github.com/KaotoIO/kaoto-ui/pull/2295 chore(deps): update dependency @testing-library/user-event to v14.

item.title: kaoto-backend v1.4.0
item.description: What’s Changed Prepare for 1.4.0 by @igarashitm in https://github.com/KaotoIO/kaoto-backend/pull/862 fix: bindingMode: off is converted to bindingMode: false by @igarashitm in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-next v0.2.0
item.description: What’s Changed feat(ui): Add basic UI scaffolding by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.4.0
item.description: What’s Changed feat: Expose wrapField function by @lordrip in https://github.com/KaotoIO/uniforms-patternfly/pull/8 Full Changelog: https://github.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.3.2
item.description: What’s Changed chore(docs): Update README.md file by @lordrip in https://github.com/KaotoIO/uniforms-patternfly/pull/6 Full Changelog: https://github.

item.title: uniforms-patternfly @kaoto-next/uniforms-patternfly@0.3.1
item.description: What’s Changed feat: Initial commit by @lordrip in https://github.com/KaotoIO/uniforms-patternfly/pull/1 chore(publish): Add registry information by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v1.3.0
item.description: Read more

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.3.0
item.description: What’s Changed Functional change chore(deployment): Disable Deploy button by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.2.1
item.description: What’s Changed chore: Provide information to release by @apupier in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.2.0
item.description: What’s Changed Features feat: Persist layout choice to local storage by @tplevko in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v1.2.0
item.description: What’s Changed Features feat: build standalone images by @lburgazzoli in https://github.

item.description: eerkmen made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.description: Efe Erkmen made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: Lars Heinemann
item.description: Lars Heinemann made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-backend v1.1.1
item.description: Small fixes because the 1.1.0 version in native mode had a blocking bug that prevented it from running.

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.1.0
item.description: Features feat(about): Add About modal to display front and back version by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v1.1.0
item.description: This is version 1.1.0 of Kaoto Backend! This version differs from latest final release in 3 main new features:

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.1.0-M3
item.description: What’s Changed (chore): Set version to v1.1.0-dev by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.1.0-M2
item.description: This is a pre-release very close to the 1.1.0 milestone. We have fixed several features towards the goals of the milestone, played with multiple routes, and made sure to update dependencies.

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v1.1.0-M2
item.description: This release is almost closing all 1.1.0 milestone goals. What’s Changed We added some new features:

item.title: Luca Burgazzoli
item.description: Luca Burgazzoli made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.1.0-M1
item.description: What’s Changed chore: update kaoto version to 1.0.1-dev by @kahboom in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v1.1.0-M1
item.description: This is a release working towards milestone 1.1.0. It includes an upgrade to Quarkus 3.

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v1.0.1
item.description: What’s Changed This is a patch release with some version updates and minor bug fixing.

item.title: Matej Králik
item.description: Matej Králik made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: Dominik Jelínek
item.description: Dominik Jelínek made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: mkralik3
item.description: mkralik3 made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: Martin Muzikar
item.description: Martin Muzikar made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: Purva Naik
item.description: Purva Naik made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.0.0 🎉
item.description: Overview This marks the first major release for Kaoto. 🍾 Kaoto is an open source visual integration and workflow editor.

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v1.0.0
item.description: :partying_face: :tada: :balloon: This is our 1.0.0 release! :champagne: Conversions from the graphical canvas to the source text editor are complete.

item.title: Dominik Jelinek
item.description: Dominik Jelinek made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui v1.0.0-rc1
item.description: What’s Changed Bug Fixes fix(steps-details): Required object type’s parameters are lost by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v1.0.0-rc1
item.description: This is the release candidate for 1.0.0. It doesn’t have much more than a few bug fixings, but it is significantly different from previous v0.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.7.6
item.description: What’s Changed BugFixes fix(StepsService): Generate steady IDs for steps and branches by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.7.6
item.description: What’s Changed Features feature: Add new endpoint to show version of the backend by @Delawen in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.7.5
item.description: What’s Changed Bugfixes Remove default values from code generation by @Delawen in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.7.5
item.description: What’s Changed Bugfixes fix(modals): Modals have an incorrect height by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.7.4
item.description: What’s Changed Bugfixes fix: when an id was null, there was still cases in which we lost branches by @Delawen in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.7.4
item.description: What’s Changed Prepare next development iteration 0.7.4 by @apupier in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.7.3
item.description: What’s Changed Features Hide Add Branch button for steps with custom extensions by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.7.3
item.description: What’s Changed Features feature: consider branch identifier on choices by @Delawen in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.7.2
item.description: What’s Changed Bugfixes fix(jest): Jest warning about duplicated step mock by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.7.2
item.description: What’s Changed Bugfixes fix: When no start step is available, don’t go crazy by @Delawen in https://github.

item.title: Antonin Stefanutti
item.description: Antonin Stefanutti made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.7.1
item.description: What’s Changed Features Add gzip config to nginx server by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.7.1
item.description: What’s Changed Bugfixes fix: Step extension doesn’t load in some case by @igarashitm in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.7.0
item.description: What’s Changed Features feat(settings): allow light mode & add labels to step names by @kahboom in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.7.0
item.description: What’s Changed Features Update view definition zip file used by native artifact in prod to by @apupier in https://github.

item.title: Mikhail Abramov
item.description: Mikhail Abramov made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: Helio Frota
item.description: Helio Frota made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v0.6.2
item.description: This patch release contains a few step extensions for EIP that now the kaoto-ui will use.

item.title: Tomas Plevko
item.description: Tomas Plevko made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.6.1
item.description: What’s Changed Features feat(branching): add append for branch steps and branch-containing steps by @kahboom in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.6.1
item.description: What’s Changed Features Provide Exception stack in server log when there is “Error getting capabilities.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.6.0
item.description: What’s Changed Features Branch support: feat(branching): add support to edit branch step properties by @kahboom in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.6.0
item.description: What’s Changed feature(eip): Add Threads EIP by @Delawen in https://github.com/KaotoIO/kaoto-backend/pull/385 feature(eip): Add Transacted EIP by @Delawen in https://github.

item.title: Javier López de Ancos
item.description: Javier López de Ancos made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v0.5.1
item.description: What’s Changed Added some EIPs more and fixed minor bugs.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.5.0
item.description: What’s Changed Features feat(viz): migrate to elk for layouting by @kahboom in https://github.

item.title: tplevko
item.description: tplevko made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v0.5.0
item.description: What’s Changed Added some new EIPs and strenghten the APIs for the frontend to handle branches.

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v0.4.3
item.description: What’s Changed Features feature(eip): Add Rollback EIP by @Delawen in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v0.4.2
item.description: Minor version release with Quarkus update. Now we support Windows native executables!

item.title: kaoto-backend Backend v0.4.1
item.description: Minor release with bug fixes and dependencies updates. Features Make Kaoto look for kamelets in specified namespace based on defined property by @mmelko in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.4.3
item.description: What’s Changed This release addresses an issue with the npm package that gets published for kaoto-ui and is used by vscode-kaoto.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.4.2
item.description: What’s Changed Fixes fix(catalog): Avoid creating gaps between steps. #797 by @lordrip in https://github.

item.title: Ricardo M
item.description: Ricardo M made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: Ricardo M.
item.description: Ricardo M. made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.4.1
item.description: What’s Changed chore: bump kaoto version to 0.4.1 by @kahboom in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.4.0 🎉
item.description: What’s Changed in the Frontend Main changes include a VS Code plugin, support for visualizing EIP branching, layouting, auto-layout choice (with new icons!

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.4.0
item.description: What’s Changed in the Backend Removed API v0 no longer used by the frontend Add all Camel Components to the Step Catalog Improved startup time that was slowed down after adding camel Read more

item.title: Asish Abraham Joseph
item.description: Asish Abraham Joseph made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.description: José Ráez Rodríguez made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.description: JoshiRaez made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.description: Thiago Lugli made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.3.1
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/KaotoIO/kaoto-ui/compare/v0.3.0...v0.3.1 Bumped version for npm package Read more

item.title: kaoto-ui v0.3.0 🎉
item.description: What’s Changed in the Frontend Main changes include a new layout, persistent steps between changes, settings (with dark mode!

item.title: kaoto-backend v0.3.0
item.description: What’s Changed in the Backend Support for editing Kamelets Support for editing Camel Routes (Integration kind of resource) Cluster management: start, stop, list resources in the cluster Add [mutation testing](https://github.

item.description: kahboom made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-backend Version 0.2.1 with bug fixes
item.description: This is a small patch bug fix adding a workaround for the Parameter polymorphism in https://github.

item.title: Evan Shortiss
item.description: Evan Shortiss made their first commit on Kaoto!

item.title: kaoto-ui Version 0.2.0 with improved editor!
item.description: What’s Changed Provide color syntax for Yaml textual editor #37 by @apupier in https://github.

item.title: kaoto-backend Version 0.2.0 with improved editor!
item.description: What’s Changed Cluster deployment support (not available on frontend yet) in https://github.

item.description: What’s Changed This is the first release for the Kaoto backend.

item.title: Kaoto was born
item.description: Kaoto was born on a virtual coffee with Zineb , Rachel , and María .
